server.name: shodasha-civic-forum
server.description: Shodasha Civic Forum - Public discussion platform for Jantar Mantar demonstrations and public policy.

tools.name: get_trending_posts
tools.description: Retrieve the most trending civic discussions and observations at Jantar Mantar.

limit.description: Number of posts to retrieve. Default is 20.

tools.name: search_posts
tools.description: Search the forum for specific keywords related to civic issues, bills, or demonstrations.
